title: auricula-ursi glutinosa
intro: Auricula-ursi glutinosa, also known as Bearberry or Kinnikinnick, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to North America and Europe, belonging to the heath family. The plant's medicinal properties lie in its leaves and berries, which contain a high concentration of arbutin, a compound with antimicrobial and astringent properties. The health benefits of Auricula-ursi glutinosa include its ability to treat urinary tract infections, diarrhea, and inflammation due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
